---
title: "Kwangmin Kim"
subtitle: "AI Engineer | ML Engineer | Data Scientist"
image: images/profile.jpg
about:
  template: solana
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 12em
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/kmink3225
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/kwangmin-kim-a5241b200/
    - icon: rss
      text: Blog
      href: docs/blog/index.qmd
---

## About

통계학을 기반으로 데이터 분석에서 출발해 머신러닝, 딥러닝, 그리고 AI 엔지니어링으로 커리어를 확장해온 엔지니어입니다. 데이터에서 의미를 추출하고, 모델을 설계하며, 이를 프로덕션 환경에서 동작하는 시스템으로 구현하는 전 과정에 관심을 두고 있습니다.

## Skills

**AI/ML** --- LLM, RAG, LangChain, LangGraph, Fine-tuning, Agent Design

**Machine Learning** --- Supervised/Unsupervised Learning, Feature Engineering, Model Optimization

**Statistics** --- Experimental Design, Bayesian Inference, Time Series Analysis, Causal Inference

**Engineering** --- Python, R, SQL, Azure, Docker, Git

## Education

**Columbia University** | M.S. in Biostatistics

**Baruch College, CUNY** | B.A. in Mathematics

**Kangwon National University** | B.S. in Biochemistry
